nodes.name: Daily 2pm UTC
nodes.notes: HARO shut down in 2024. Modern free + freemium journalist-pitch services have moved to Qwoted, SourceBottle, Help a B2B Writer, Featured.com. They all email queries. This workflow fans out across the user's Gmail inbox to find pitchable queries in the tarot/astrology/spirituality niche.

filters.q: (from:queries@helpareporter.com OR from:notifications@qwoted.com OR from:noreply@sourcebottle.com OR from:hello@featured.com OR from:noreply@helpab2bwriter.com OR subject:"journalist query" OR subject:HARO OR subject:Qwoted) newer_than:1d

meta.description: Daily 2pm UTC: scans the user's Gmail for journalist pitch emails (HARO replacements: Qwoted, SourceBottle, HelpaB2BWriter, Featured), filters down to the tarot/astrology/spirituality niche, sends a digest to lawrence.ma000@gmail.com with deadlines surfaced and Gmail deep-links for each match. Activate manually after signing up to at least one of the source services.
